hero.subtitle: SOFTWARE PLANS
hero.title: Complete Dental Practice Management Software
hero.description: Choose the right software plan for your dental practice. From single-provider practices to multi-location groups, we have a solution that scales with your needs.

pricing.title: SOFTWARE PLANS
pricing.description: Powerful practice management software designed specifically for dental practices of all sizes.

plans.name: Essentials
plans.description: For solo practitioners and small practices

faqs.question: Can I upgrade my plan as my practice grows?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade your plan at any time. Your data will transfer seamlessly to the new plan, and the price difference will be prorated for the remainder of your billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is training included with the software?
faqs.answer: Basic training resources are included with all plans. The Professional plan includes comprehensive staff training sessions, while the Enterprise plan includes personalized on-site implementation and training.

faqs.question: Can I add individual solutions to my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can enhance any plan with additional specialized solutions like AI Diagnostics, Advanced Imaging, or CAD/CAM integration at additional cost. Contact our sales team for custom pricing.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards and offer ACH payment options for yearly subscriptions. Enterprise customers may also arrange invoiced payment terms.

questions.question: Can I upgrade my plan as my practice grows?
questions.answer: Yes, you can upgrade your plan at any time. Your data will transfer seamlessly to the new plan, and the price difference will be prorated for the remainder of your billing cycle.

questions.question: Is training included with the software?
questions.answer: Basic training resources are included with all plans. The Professional plan includes comprehensive staff training sessions, while the Enterprise plan includes personalized on-site implementation and training.

questions.question: Can I add individual solutions to my plan?
questions.answer: Yes, you can enhance any plan with additional specialized solutions like AI Diagnostics, Advanced Imaging, or CAD/CAM integration at additional cost. Contact our sales team for custom pricing.

questions.question: What payment methods do you accept?
questions.answer: We accept all major credit cards and offer ACH payment options for yearly subscriptions. Enterprise customers may also arrange invoiced payment terms.

questions.question: Is there a contract or commitment period?
questions.answer: Monthly plans can be canceled at any time. Annual plans offer significant savings but require a 12-month commitment. Enterprise plans typically include custom terms based on your organization's needs.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Dental Practice?
cta.description: Join thousands of dental practices using our software to streamline operations and improve patient care.

integration.title: Seamless Integration
integration.description: Our software integrates with your favorite dental tools and services
